deliverables: `npm run fetch-pdb` writes to `public/data/AF-O43556-F1.pdb`, the path Vite serves as `/data/AF-O43556-F1.pdb`.
Package script verification and relevant hook/build checks pass.
success_criteria: A Node assertion confirms `package.json` fetch-pdb includes `public/data/AF-O43556-F1.pdb`.
`npm run fetch-pdb` creates a PDB file larger than 100 KB at `public/data/AF-O43556-F1.pdb`.
testable_behaviors: Fresh local setup can populate the local PDB asset used by the app before falling back to AlphaFold remote fetch.
scope_boundaries: Do not change AlphaFold accession or SGCE scientific data.
Do not force-add gitignored PDB binary unless user approves offline bundling.
